title: Jupyter Notebook Collaboration
description: Jupyter Notebook real-time collaborative editing settings

collaborationEnabled.title: Enable Collaboration
collaborationEnabled.description: Master toggle for all real-time collaborative editing features

autoConnect.title: Auto Connect
autoConnect.description: Automatically connect to collaboration server when opening notebooks

defaultRole.title: Default Role
defaultRole.description: Default role assigned to users joining collaborative sessions

presence.title: User Presence
presence.description: Settings for user presence awareness features

showCursors.title: Show Remote Cursors
showCursors.description: Show other users' cursor positions in the notebook

showSelections.title: Show Remote Selections
showSelections.description: Show other users' text selections in the notebook

showAvatars.title: Show User Avatars
showAvatars.description: Show user avatars in the collaboration bar

showNames.title: Show User Names
showNames.description: Show user names in the collaboration bar

cursorBlinkRate.title: Cursor Blink Rate
cursorBlinkRate.description: Blink rate for remote cursors in milliseconds (0 to disable blinking)

inactivityTimeout.title: Inactivity Timeout
inactivityTimeout.description: Time in seconds after which a user is considered inactive (0 to disable)

enabled.title: Enable Cell Locking
enabled.description: Enable cell-level locking to prevent simultaneous editing

autoLock.title: Auto-Lock on Edit
autoLock.description: Automatically lock cells when editing begins

lockTimeout.title: Lock Timeout
lockTimeout.description: Time in seconds after which an inactive lock is automatically released (0 to disable)

showLockIndicators.title: Show Lock Indicators
showLockIndicators.description: Show visual indicators for locked cells

allowAdminOverride.title: Allow Admin Override
allowAdminOverride.description: Allow administrators to forcibly release locks

comments.title: Comments
comments.description: Settings for cell comments and review system

enabled.title: Enable Comments
enabled.description: Enable comment and review system for notebook cells

showIndicators.title: Show Comment Indicators
showIndicators.description: Show visual indicators for cells with comments

maxLength.title: Maximum Comment Length
maxLength.description: Maximum length of comments in characters

history.title: Version History
history.description: Settings for change history and versioning

enabled.title: Enable Version History
enabled.description: Enable change history tracking and versioning

autoSaveInterval.title: Auto-Save Interval
autoSaveInterval.description: Time in seconds between automatic version snapshots (0 to disable)

maxVersions.title: Maximum Versions
maxVersions.description: Maximum number of versions to keep in history (0 for unlimited)

showHistoryButton.title: Show History Button
showHistoryButton.description: Show version history button in the toolbar

statusBar.title: Status Bar
statusBar.description: Settings for collaboration status indicators in the status bar

showCollaborationStatus.title: Show Collaboration Status
showCollaborationStatus.description: Show collaboration connection status in the status bar

showActiveUsers.title: Show Active Users
showActiveUsers.description: Show number of active users in the status bar

showUserList.title: Show User List
showUserList.description: Show list of active users in the status bar

condensedView.title: Condensed View
condensedView.description: Use condensed view for collaboration status in the status bar

requireSecureWebSocket.title: Require Secure WebSocket
requireSecureWebSocket.description: Require WSS (WebSocket Secure) for all collaboration connections

sessionTimeout.title: Session Timeout
sessionTimeout.description: Time in minutes after which inactive collaboration sessions are terminated (0 to disable)

heartbeatInterval.title: Heartbeat Interval
heartbeatInterval.description: Time in seconds between WebSocket heartbeat messages
